title: Commercial-Grade Pressure Washing Equipment | Spokane, WA
description: See the professional, trailer-mounted hot water rig and commercial equipment 3 Gen Pressure Washing brings to every Spokane property. We use continuous 200°F hot-water systems, 8.0 GPM flow rates, and 500-gallon onboard water tanks.

data.desc: We bring the heavy-duty machinery. Our dual-axle trailer carries continuous 200°F hot-water systems and self-contained 500-gallon water tanks to deliver flawless results safely - without relying on consumer-grade wands.

data.heading: Why Our Setup Outperforms DIY & Consumer Gear
data.subheading: A detailed look at the difference between professional machinery and homeowner wands.
data.content:
A major risk in exterior cleaning is the use of improper, cheap tools. Homeowner-grade electric wands lack consistent pressure control and operate entirely on cold water. This forces operators to get too close to the surface, resulting in permanent 'tiger stripe' concrete scars or splintered siding. Our industrial setup completely eliminates these risks.

🔥 200°F Thermal Heat

Our rig heats water up to 200°F to instantly dissolve grease, oils, gum, and deep organic growth. Cold-water wands simply smear grease around; thermal power extracts it from porous concrete.

💧 8.0 GPM Industrial Flow

Pressure cuts, but high water volume (Flow Rate) is what safely lifts and sweeps debris away. Operating at 8.0 GPM enables deep cleaning at lower, safer surface pressures.

🚚 Onboard 500G Tanks

Our trailer-mounted rig operates entirely on its self-contained water tanks. This means zero reliance on your property's water spigots, low pressure, or fragile plumbing systems.

Side-by-Side Equipment Comparison

Cleaning Metric3 Gen Industrial RigTypical DIY Cold Wand
Water TemperatureContinuous 200°F Hot WaterAmbient / Cold Water Only
Flow Rate (Volume)8.0 Gallons Per Minute (GPM)1.2 to 1.8 GPM (very low)
Flatwork UniformityStreak-Free Rotary Surface CleanersHandheld lance causes tiger striping
Water IndependenceOnboard 500-Gallon Buffer TanksRequires client spigot & high pressure
Pressure RegulationFine-tuned dual unloading valvesUnregulated pulsing causes damage
